assumption_note: Fresh (non-fried, non-rice) spring roll -- nutrition-tracking sources put a single fresh shrimp/vegetable spring roll at ~85g (~3 oz). Matches SHRIMP SPRING ROLL and TOFU SPRING ROLL specifically (checked before the broader ROLL pattern below, since both contain the word "roll").

Standard rice-based sushi roll (California Roll, Vegetarian Roll, etc.) -- nutrition sources put a whole California-style roll at roughly 6-8 oz (168-224g); used the midpoint. Applied to GARDEN VEGETABLE SALAD ROLL, CALIFORNIA ROLL, VEGETARIAN ROLL, CUCUMBER AVOCADO ROLL, ROCK 'N ROLL, SHRIMP TEMPURA (a roll, not a fried appetizer, per Kikka's own naming), and the two "...& Cali Mixer" combo items -- the "Mixer" ones are a real open question (possibly two rolls combined, not one) flagged for review, not resolved here.
